code:
mut i = 1
mut fizz_count = 0
mut buzz_count = 0

while i <= 15
  fizz_count = fizz_count + 1
  buzz_count = buzz_count + 1

  if fizz_count == 3 and buzz_count == 5
    print("FizzBuzz")
    fizz_count = 0
    buzz_count = 0
  else if fizz_count == 3
    print("Fizz")
    fizz_count = 0
  else if buzz_count == 5
    print("Buzz")
    buzz_count = 0
  else
    print("#{i}")
  end

  i = i + 1
end
